mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate for equity valuations, directly compressing forward S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show positive correlation with FEDFUNDS levels over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp monthly increase in the unemployment rate signals immediate labor market deterioration, triggering risk-off positioning that depresses S&P 500 returns over the subsequent 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 65% of instances where UNRATE rises > 0.2pp.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real sales of automobiles and housing starts indicates broad-based consumer demand recovery, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive momentum in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 60-day SPX returns (Rank IC < 0.02).

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production reflects strengthening supply-side capacity utilization, which supports corporate earnings growth and generates positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO acceleration yields negative or flat 20-day SPX returns during early-cycle expansion phases.

mechanism_narrative: When core inflation indexed by CPIAUCSL exceeds 330.0, markets price in aggressive central bank tightening, forcing immediate equity drawdowns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward 5-day returns remain positive in > 70% of observations where CPIAUCSL exceeds 330.0.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in total nonfarm payrolls expands aggregate consumer spending capacity, providing a structural tailwind that lifts S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth shows zero or negative correlation with 60-day SPX returns across all macro regimes.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between quarterly GDP growth and monthly auto sales reveals underlying demand resilience; when RSAFS outpaces GDPC1 momentum, equity markets price in stronger near-term earnings, yielding positive 20-day returns.
failure_condition: RSAFS outperformance relative to GDPC1 momentum fails to generate positive 20-day SPX returns (t-stat < 1.5).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp monthly contraction in industrial production signals immediate supply chain disruption or demand collapse, triggering rapid risk-off selling that depresses S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 60% of instances where INDPRO declines > 0.5%.
